name: smoke
description: Substrate smoke test — prints its inputs and completes. Use this to verify the engine substrate (Kafka -> queue -> worker -> checkpoint -> complete) end-to-end after a deploy or schema change. Replaces the in-Go-code built-in of the same name (retired 2026-06-01).

parameters.message: smoke run org=${inputs.org_id} ws=${inputs.workspace_id} tick=${inputs.tick_id} msg=${inputs.message}
